visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in the passenger seat of a dimly lit vehicle at night. The man, who has dark hair and a somber expression, is the central focus. He is looking slightly off-camera, his face illuminated by a soft, cool light. In the background, another man is visible in profile, slightly out of focus, sitting in the driver's seat. The interior of the car is dark, with the background outside the vehicle appearing as a blur of dark green, suggesting a forest or trees at night. In the upper left corner of the frame, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face and the hand covering his mouth. A man speaks in a calm and measured tone, his voice low and steady. He begins with a quiet, almost conclusive statement, "来了" (It's here). He then continues in a reflective and appreciative manner, as if making a serious observation, "你在这几年里头呢，都很能干" (You've been very capable in these past few years). The background is quiet, with no discernible music or sound effects, placing all the focus on the man's solemn words.
